view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the '5-session package purchase' scenario, but there is no evidence provided that directly supports the outcome of this scenario. The prior steps indicate successful bookings, but they do not confirm the specific behavior expected from the persona scenario. Therefore, without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and its results, the validation remains inconclusive.
